headline: Copart (NASDAQ:CPRT) Q3 Earnings Beat Lifted by EPS and Revenue, Shares Still Dip
summary: Copart (CPRT) reported fiscal Q3 earnings with revenue of $1.24B and EPS of $0.43, slightly beating estimates. Despite the beat, stock fell 2% after-hours due to marginal growth and a slight decline in net income.

headline: Copart Q3 EPS $0.43 Beats $0.41 Estimate, Sales $1.237B Beat $1.195B Estimate
summary: Copart (NASDAQ:CPRT) reported quarterly earnings of $0.43 per share which beat the analyst consensus estimate of $0.41 by 2.38 percent. This is a 2.38 percent increase over earnings of $0.42 per share from the same

headline: What To Expect From Copart’s (CPRT) Q1 Earnings
summary: Online vehicle auction company Copart (NASDAQ:CPRT) will be announcing earnings results this Thursday after market close. Here’s what you need to know.

headline: Copart (CPRT) Q2 2026 Earnings Transcript
summary: Jeffrey Liaw: Thank you, Owen.  For the second quarter, our global insurance units declined 9% or 4%, excluding the effect of catastrophic units from a year ago.  First, shifts in policies in force and exposure levels across insurance carriers who themselves are experiencing differential growth rates.
